title: Hiriluk Finds Chopper
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on hiriluk finds chopper, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Hiriluk Finds Chopper. Hiriluk reaches out to Chopper and gives him a place to belong, while Drum Kingdom’s cruelty remains in the background. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!? You can talk!? The hell were you silent for 3 whole days then!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I thought you might not like me anymore if I talked...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Transparent, communication, consequences

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I tried talking to humans once before... but they shot me in return.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: A Reindeer that can talk is just a freak...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: So what if you can talk? It ain't nothing weird or unique.

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: I can talk too! In fact, I can talk circles around you.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Take cover, Chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: It's gonna Bloom!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Whew, close call... another failure, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You alright?

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Eh eh... what am I saying, you're already covered in bandages!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Eh eh eh eh!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: ...Why did you call me Chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Tony Tony Chopperr.

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: A fitting name for a Reindeer with strong looking horns that could even bring down a tree...

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Like it?

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: 'Cause that's what I'll call you from now on...!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Chopperr...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh! Eh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Mahaha- haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am not sure if I can't get a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What new law shall I pass today!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's the matter, Dalton?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You've been acting strange ever since the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Cress... Kuromarimo...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Captain of drum kingdom's royal guards DALTON

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Will this kingdom ever return to its former days...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I feel we're distancing our people more with each day.

summary: This part highlights hiriluk finds chopper and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
